title: Hyperliquid Liquid Staking with @kinetiq_xyz
summary_title: HyperLiquid's validator cartel problem and Kinetiq's StakeHub solution
summary_description: Omnia from Kinetiq explains why liquid staking needs autonomous validator selection, not secret kickback deals.

key_moments.label: Discussion of yesterday's exchange attack and HLP bank run attempt
Omnia alleges Binance, OKEx, BitGet coordinated to attack HyperLiquid
Debate: is HyperLiquid decentralized or centralized? Spectrum argument
Builder codes as existential threat to centralized exchanges
Meme coin infrastructure gap between HyperCore and HyperEVM
Omnia introduces Kinetiq: 13-person team, all friends or prior collaborators
StakeHub: autonomous validator scoring replaces kickback deals
K-Hype design: wrapped by default, growing exchange ratio, no extra wrapping step

pull_quote: For us, that doesn't make any sense. We don't give a fuck about working with any validator in particular.
